import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_three(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            panic("bad input")
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      panic("oob")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      panic("bad input")
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let nums = parse_three(input)
  if nums.len() < 3
    print("")
    return
  end
  let a = match nums.get(0) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let b = match nums.get(1) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let s = match nums.get(2) when Some(v) v when None 1 end
  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  print(out)
end
